name: عرض العضو الأساسي
message_template:
{name}، سعرك كـ عضو في عوجا إيليت أرخص دايمًا 🤍
ـ٢٠٪ على ليالي الأحد–الأربعاء، وتأخير خروج مجاني.
نجهّز لك وحدتك هالأسبوع؟
image_prompt:
SCENE: a matte-black membership card with a thin brushed-gold edge resting on warm travertine beside a single brass room key and three dates, soft golden-hour light from the left, intimate and exclusive.

PHOTOREALISTIC, ultra-detailed, editorial luxury-hospitality photograph. AESTHETIC: high-end Saudi boutique hospitality in the visual language of Aman Resorts and JW Marriott / Marriott Bonvoy editorial, fused with Najdi / Diriyah heritage. STRICT COLOR PALETTE: warm gold #C8A96E, deep near-black ink #161310, soft cream #F7F1E6, warm travertine beige, brushed-brass accents — absolutely no neon, no saturated primaries, no cool blue or teal grade. LIGHTING: warm golden-hour sunlight, low raking angle, long soft shadows, gentle volumetric haze, cinematic, ~5200K, soft highlight falloff. MATERIALS & TEXTURE: hand-troweled Najdi mud-brick, travertine and warm limestone, brushed brass, linen and boucle textiles, dark walnut wood, woven palm detail — visible fine micro-texture. CAMERA: medium-format Phase One, 80mm lens, f/2.8, shallow depth of field, creamy bokeh, tack-sharp focal subject. COMPOSITION: vertical 4:5 frame; place the main subject in the LOWER TWO-THIRDS and keep the TOP THIRD clean empty negative space for Arabic text (no object in the top third). MOOD: calm, premium, exclusive, serene, aspirational. POST: subtle fine film grain, natural rich contrast, gentle highlight roll-off, NO HDR look. OUTPUT: hyper-realistic, magazine-cover quality, 8k.

NEGATIVE — DO NOT INCLUDE: any text, letters, Arabic or English writing, numbers, logos, watermarks, UI; no human faces, no deformed hands; no Western/European architecture, no skyscrapers, no snow; no clutter, no plastic, no cartoon or 3D-render look, no oversaturation, no blue/teal grade, no busy patterns in the top third.

name: الليلة الثالثة هدية (٢ والثالثة علينا)
message_template:
{name}، عرض خاص لك:
احجز ليلتين من الأحد للأربعاء، والثالثة هدية منّا 🤍
نمسك لك التواريخ قبل تنحجز؟
